title: Quiz: Dirac Notation
description: Test your understanding of bra-ket notation and its applications

questions.question: If |ψ⟩ = (1, i)ᵀ, what is ⟨ψ|?
questions.explanation: The bra is the conjugate transpose of the ket. For |ψ⟩ = (1, i)ᵀ, we take the transpose and conjugate each element: ⟨ψ| = (1*, i*) = (1, -i).

questions.question: What is the dimension of |0⟩⟨1|?
questions.explanation: |0⟩⟨1| is an outer product. |0⟩ is 2×1 and ⟨1| is 1×2, so |0⟩⟨1| is 2×2.

questions.question: For any projector P = |ψ⟩⟨ψ|, we have P² = P.
The completeness relation |0⟩⟨0| + |1⟩⟨1| = I implies:

options.text: Any state can be written as a|0⟩ + b|1⟩

questions.explanation: The completeness relation for an orthonormal basis means: (a) the states are orthogonal, (b) they span the space (complete), and (c) any state can be expanded in this basis.

questions.question: ⟨φ|ψ⟩ = ⟨ψ|φ⟩ for all states |φ⟩ and |ψ⟩.
questions.explanation: False! ⟨φ|ψ⟩ = ⟨ψ|φ⟩* (complex conjugate), not equal. The inner product is conjugate-symmetric, not symmetric.

questions.question: Which of the following are correct expressions for the Pauli X gate? (Select all that apply)
questions.explanation: a) and b) are the same expression (addition is commutative). c) is X in the Hadamard basis (spectral decomposition with eigenvalues ±1). d) is the identity I, not X.
